Requires manual subscription creation for the webhook due to ngrok's dynamic URLs, highlighting a potential setup complexity for dynamic environments.

results.description: Simulate realistic price negotiations between Buyer and Seller agents using LLM-generated messages and agent logic.
key_insights: The system uses a multi-agent architecture with Buyer, Seller, and Mediator agents.
Agents communicate directly through message exchange to simulate negotiation rounds.
The Mediator agent intervenes periodically to facilitate agreement, suggesting compromises.
Communication is real-time, with dynamic message exchange and live progress tracking.
The system is designed for synchronous, turn-based interaction between agents during negotiation rounds.

results.description: The future of digital agents. 🧠 Infinite APIs and tooling. Bring your own prompts, LLM, messaging provider. ⚡
key_insights: Uses FastAPI for the server, indicating a web-based API for interaction.
Integrates with Stripe webhooks for payment processing, suggesting external services push events to the application.
Mentions Telegram bot integration, implying an agent interacting with users via a messaging platform.
Utilizes Celery for background tasks, which could involve asynchronous processing of agent communications or other events.
Ngrok is used for exposing local services to the internet, facilitating webhook reception and external access during development/testing.

results.description: Coleção pública de system messages (instruções de sistema) para aprimorar o desempenho, persona e segurança de diversos agentes de IA/LLMs.
key_insights: Das Repository sammelt System-Nachrichten, die als initiale Konfigurations-Prompts für KI-Agenten dienen, um deren Persona, Regeln und Einschränkungen festzulegen.
Der Fokus liegt auf der Verbesserung der Qualität, Sicherheit, Personalisierung und Produktivität von LLMs durch gut gestaltete System-Nachrichten.
Es werden verschiedene Kategorien von System-Nachrichten unterschieden, wie z.B. für Experten-Personas, Sicherheits-Guardrails, strukturierte Ausgaben und kreative Stile.
Die System-Nachrichten sind darauf ausgelegt, die Interaktion mit dem LLM zu steuern und vorhersehbare, leistungsstarke Ergebnisse zu gewährleisten.

results.description: 🧠 Autonomous AI Git agent that generates intelligent commit messages using local LLMs and semantic code analysis. 100% free, privacy-first.
key_insights: Utilizes local LLMs (Ollama) for AI-powered commit message generation, ensuring privacy and local processing.
Offers a CLI for direct user interaction and management of Git operations, including multi-repository support.
Integrates with GitHub for PR creation and issue management, likely through direct API calls.
Provides a web dashboard for visual insights, suggesting a local web server for user interaction.
Employs a 'watch' mode for autonomous, auto-committing behavior, reacting directly to file system changes.

results.description: This document defines the Universal Interaction Protocol (UIP), a canonical, IM-agnostic interaction protocol that enables any Instant Messaging (IM) system to interact seamlessly with Clawdbot, without requiring awareness of agents, LLMs, prompts, or tools.
key_insights: Das Universal Interaction Protocol (UIP) dient als IM-agnostische Schicht, die es jedem Instant Messaging System ermöglicht, mit einem KI-Agenten (Moltbot/Clawdbot) zu interagieren.
Ein Go-basierter UIP Gateway empfängt Nachrichten von verschiedenen IMs (über HTTP) und leitet sie als Webhooks an Moltbot weiter.
Moltbot sendet Antworten über einen Callback-Webhook zurück an den UIP Gateway, der die Antwort dann an das ursprüngliche IM-System weiterleitet.
Das System unterstützt bidirektionale Kommunikation (synchrone Anfragen und asynchrone Callbacks) und ist durch eine Plugin-basierte Adapter-Architektur erweiterbar.
Die Architektur abstrahiert die Komplexität der verschiedenen IM-Plattformen und ermöglicht eine zentrale Integration mit dem KI-Agenten.

results.description: Security layer for AI agent-to-agent communication. Every message is signed, inspected, and logged. If it doesn't comply, it doesn't pass. No LLM. No cloud. Single binary. Your infra, your data.
key_insights: Oktsec acts as a security layer for AI agent-to-agent communication, specifically monitoring and enforcing policies on Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool calls and CLI operations.

It implements a 10-stage security pipeline including rate limiting, identity verification (Ed25519 signatures), agent suspension, YAML-based ACLs, content scanning (188 detection rules), intent validation, blocked content enforcement, multi-message escalation, auditing (SQLite with content hash and tamper evidence), and anomaly detection.

Oktsec automatically discovers and supports 17 MCP clients, primarily through wrapping and scanning stdio-based MCP communication, and also offers gateway routing and tool-call interception for some clients like Claude Code.
It provides real-time interception, detection, blocking, and auditing of agent communications, aligning with OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications.
The system is designed to be self-hosted ('Your infra, your data'), single binary, and does not rely on LLMs or cloud services for its core security functions.

results.description: SwarAI is a voice-enabled AI assistant that uses multi-agent orchestration, LLM reasoning, and task automation to perform actions like messaging, file search, payment and information retrieval. It is powered by a FastAPI backend with interactive web-based interfaces for seamless user interaction.
key_insights: SwarAI utilizes a multi-agent orchestration pattern, specifically mentioning CrewAI, to manage interactions between 13 specialized AI agents.
The system integrates various external services and APIs, including WhatsApp, email, file systems, and system controls, implying agents communicate with these external interfaces.
A FastAPI backend with WebSocket support enables real-time processing and interaction, suggesting direct communication channels between the frontend and the agent system.
Conversation memory is managed via MongoDB (optional), indicating a persistent storage mechanism for agent context and communication history.

The architecture involves an 'AI Enhancement Layer' using Groq LLM for intent detection and command clarity, suggesting an internal communication flow for pre-processing user input before routing to specialized agents.

results.description: This pipe connects Open WebUI to an external n8n workflow. It sends the user’s current message and metadata to n8n, which routes the request to an AI Agent node (backed by any model provider such as OpenAI, Ollama, or local LLMs) and returns the generated result.
key_insights: Open WebUI sendet Nachrichten und Metadaten über einen konfigurierten Webhook an n8n.
n8n verarbeitet die Anfrage mit einem AI Agent Node und sendet die Antwort über einen 'Respond to Webhook'-Node zurück an Open WebUI.
Die Kommunikation ist nicht-streaming und erwartet eine spezifische JSON-Antwortstruktur von n8n.
Die Pipe ersetzt den direkten Modellaufruf in Open WebUI durch den Aufruf des n8n-Workflows.

results.description: LLM-first local messaging protocol for secure agent-to-agent communication over QUIC
key_insights: LLM-first design: Minimizes token cost and overhead for agent-to-agent communication.
Structured-first: Uses JSON payloads, avoiding natural language overhead for machine parsing.
Secure and authenticated: Employs Ed25519 keypairs, mTLS, and QUIC/TLS 1.3 for zero-trust local communication.
Daemon-based architecture: Agents connect via Unix sockets to a local daemon, which handles discovery, transport, and security.
Resumable and context-budget-aware: Designed for frequent agent restarts and efficient use of context.
Supports both request/response and fire-and-forget (notify) patterns.
Discovery via mDNS for LAN and static peer configuration for VPN/Tailscale.

results.description: A automation pipeline for extracting expense data from NotionDB, analysing with LLM Agent and triggering a telegram bot message
key_insights: The system directly connects to NotionDB to extract expense data.
An LLM Agent directly analyzes the extracted data.
A Telegram bot message is directly triggered based on the analysis.
The workflow is sequential and linear, indicating direct calls between components rather than asynchronous messaging or a central orchestrator.

results.description: Self-organizing multi-agent teams powered by LLMs. Give it a task, it designs the agents, assigns tools, and coordinates via message passing. No predefined roles
key_insights: Self-organizing multi-agent teams: LLM designs custom roles, system prompts, and tool assignments on the fly for each task.
Message-driven activation: Agents activate each other through explicit messages, not fixed rounds. Only addressed agents run.
Shared message board: All agents communicate via a persistent JSONL message log, allowing agents to see messages addressed to them, their role, or 'all'.
Per-agent context: Each agent maintains its own conversation history, keeping context windows focused.
Orchestrator agent: A meta-orchestrator designs the team, and an orchestrator agent manages the overall flow, including fallback turns and declaring completion.
